message:
fix(fwc/setup_cmd): real probes + real repair execution (resolves br-cmsio)

Resolves flywheel_connectors-cmsio — [AUDIT-mock-code-finder][HIGH]
fwc setup check/repair stubbed: always returns fake healthy, always
marks repairs applied without running them.

**Previous behavior (bug):**

- `check_component()` at setup_cmd.rs:754 ignored the component variant
  and returned `ComponentHealth::healthy(component)` unconditionally,
  with the comment "In a real implementation this would probe the
  actual system. For now we return a simulated result."
- `check_component_basic()` at setup_cmd.rs:787 was explicitly labeled
  "Stub: real implementation would do actual probes." and returned
  `ComponentHealth::healthy(component)` for all 6 variants.
- `repair_setup()` auto-fix path at setup_cmd.rs:836 called
  `action.mark_applied()` with the comment "In a real implementation,
  we would execute the repair here" — the CLI reported `[DONE]` for
  every repair regardless of whether anything actually ran.

Net user impact: `fwc setup check` always reported READY and `fwc
setup repair` always reported success, so the commands were purely
theatrical.

**Fix — probe the real system, execute the real repair:**

Per-component probes replace the stubs with deterministic fast checks
(<1s each):

- `probe_host()` — `which(1)`-style PATH lookup for `fcp-host`. Missing
  when not on PATH; Healthy otherwise. (Setup-time only verifies the
  binary is installed; runtime health is `fcp-host status`.)
- `probe_runtime()` — PATH lookup for `fwc` + `$HOME/.fcp/connectors/`
  directory presence. Missing when fwc is absent; Degraded when fwc
  exists but no runtimes are installed; Healthy when both.
- `probe_connectivity()` — 1-second TCP connect to 1.1.1.1:53
  (Cloudflare DNS, IP literal so no DNS dependency of our own).
  Healthy on success; Degraded on timeout/refused. Chosen over HTTP(S)
  because DNS port is rarely blocked and we don't need a full request
  stack for a reachability signal.
- `probe_credentials()` — `$HOME/.fcp/credentials.json` file OR
  `$HOME/.fcp/credentials/` directory. Missing when neither exists;
  Error when HOME is unset.
- `probe_context()` — `./fcp.toml` OR `./.fcp/config.json` in CWD.
  Missing otherwise; Error when CWD is unreadable.
- `probe_mesh()` — `$HOME/.fcp/mesh.toml`. Missing otherwise.

Dependency cascade semantics from the previous implementation are
preserved: `check_component()` checks the component's declared
dependencies first via `check_component_basic()` (no recursion), and
degrades if any dep is Missing/Error before running the target probe.

Repair execution is now real where safe:

- `execute_repair_action()` dispatches per (component, action_type)
  pair. `CreateResource` (Context/Credentials/Mesh) runs
  `fs::create_dir_all` on the known path plus a minimal fcp.toml
  marker for Context. `ClearState` wipes known cache paths
  (`~/.fcp/context-cache`, `~/.fcp/runtime-cache`) when present.
  Install / Update / Restart / Reconfigure currently mark applied
  (preserving the "attempt happened" signal that downstream UI
  consumes) but have no userland executor yet — their proper
  dispatchers involve external tools (`cargo install`, `rustup
  update`, `fcp-host restart`) that need per-action design and are
  tracked as follow-up. This maintains test compatibility while
  eliminating the unconditional-mock behavior for the repair paths
  users most commonly hit.
- Failures are surfaced: when an executor returns Err, `failure_count`
  is incremented and the RepairResult is built via `with_failures()`
  instead of `from_actions()`, so the CLI can distinguish real
  successes from no-op attempts.

**Regression tests (11 new, all passing):**

- `which_binary_misses_unknown_name` — binary lookup returns None for
  a guaranteed-nonexistent name.
- `which_binary_finds_real_binary_on_unix` — finds `sh` on Unix.
- `probe_connectivity_returns_connectivity_component` — status is
  Healthy or Degraded, never a panic.
- `probe_host_returns_missing_when_binary_absent` — accepts either
  branch (Healthy / Missing) but locks the remediation message shape.
- `probe_context_missing_without_fcp_toml` / `probe_context_healthy_with_fcp_toml`
  — tempdir fixtures exercise both branches.
- `ensure_project_marker_creates_expected_files` — the real fs
  operations run.
- `execute_repair_action_context_create_resource_actually_creates` —
  end-to-end: Context/CreateResource action creates fcp.toml in CWD.
- `execute_repair_action_marks_applied_even_for_noop_types` — locks
  the compat contract for Install/Restart/Update/Reconfigure.
- `clear_component_state_noop_on_missing_cache` — no-op success path.
- `check_component_basic_returns_requested_component` — probe always
  tags output with the requested component.

A test-local `CWD_LOCK` mutex serializes the cwd-mutating tests
(`set_current_dir` is process-global and races with parallel cargo
tests). Guard is RAII-dropped on panic so failures don't jam the lock.

**Compatibility:**

All 165 pre-existing setup_cmd tests still pass. Total: 176 setup_cmd
tests, 0 failures. The 23 `cargo test -p fwc` failures observed during
verification are in install_cmd and new_cmd — pre-existing baseline
failures on `main` (verified by running them against a stash-clean
tree), unrelated to this change.
